title: AI could double electricity use by 2030

title: Why hiring surged in May despite economic strain from the Iran war
description: There was surprising strength in the latest U.S. jobs report. Employers added 172,000 jobs in May, the third straight month of job gains. Overall, the labor market appears strong despite concerns about the Iran war, rising prices and artificial intelligence. Amna Nawaz speaks with Diane Swonk, chief economist at KPMG, a multinational accounting and advisory firm, for more analysis.
content:

title: Trump Calls for Military to Accelerate Use of AI

title: White House to accelerate development of AI for 'war fighting' and national security
description: As a major AI company warns of an increased risk of "humans losing control over AI systems", the Trump administration says it will accelerate the development and use of artificial intelligence for national security applications.
content:

title: Actors’ union approves 4-year contract with studios and streamers
description: Television and movie actors on Thursday voted overwhelmingly to ratify a four-year contract with studios and streaming services, a month after their union leaders negotiated a deal they say provides protections against synthetic actors created by artificial intelligence.
